name: "Test Caller Sprinkler"

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - feature/6888-reusable-terraform-plan-apply
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - feature/6888-reusable-terraform-plan-apply
    paths:
      - 'terraform/environments/bootstrap/**'
      - 'terraform/modules/iam_baseline/**'
      - '.github/workflows/bootstrap-sprinkler.yml'
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:

  delegate-access-plan:
    uses: ./.github/workflows/reusable_terraform_plan_test.yml
    with:
      aws_region: "eu-west-2"
      tf_workspace: "sprinkler-development"
      working_directory: "terraform/environments/bootstrap/delegate-access"
      role_name: "ModernisationPlatformGithubActionsRole"
      ACCOUNT_NUMBER: "295814833350"
    secrets:
      environment_management: ${{ secrets.MODERNISATION_PLATFORM_ENVIRONMENTS }}

  secure-baselines-plan:
    needs: delegate-access-plan
    uses: ./.github/workflows/reusable_terraform_plan_test.yml
    with:
      aws_region: "eu-west-2"
      tf_workspace: "sprinkler-development"
      working_directory: "terraform/environments/bootstrap/secure-baselines"
      role_name: "github-actions"
      ACCOUNT_NUMBER: "946070829339"
    secrets:
      environment_management: ${{ secrets.MODERNISATION_PLATFORM_ENVIRONMENTS }}

  single-sign-on-plan:
    needs: delegate-access-plan
    uses: ./.github/workflows/reusable_terraform_plan_test.yml
    with:
      aws_region: "eu-west-2"
      tf_workspace: "sprinkler-development"
      working_directory: "terraform/environments/bootstrap/single-sign-on"
      role_name: "github-actions"
      ACCOUNT_NUMBER: "946070829339"
    secrets:
      environment_management: ${{ secrets.MODERNISATION_PLATFORM_ENVIRONMENTS }} 

  member-bootstrap-plan:
    needs: single-sign-on-plan
    uses: ./.github/workflows/reusable_terraform_plan_test.yml
    with:
      aws_region: "eu-west-2"
      tf_workspace: "sprinkler-development"
      working_directory: "terraform/environments/bootstrap/member-bootstrap"
      role_name: "github-actions"
      ACCOUNT_NUMBER: "946070829339"
    secrets:
      environment_management: ${{ secrets.MODERNISATION_PLATFORM_ENVIRONMENTS }}
